g.text: Auth · Rate limiting · Input validation · CORS · Error handling

svg.text: 1. User uploads CV → File service stores to S3 → Parser extracts structure
2. User fills form → Resume session saved to MongoDB
3. AI service rewrites content → action verbs, ATS optimization
4. Resume builder maps data → HTML template (mirrors CV structure)
5. Puppeteer renders HTML → PDF streamed back to client
